evidence.quote: Four compliance minimization problems are taken as examples to demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed strategy

Calculation of the filter matrix using our 88-line code takes only 11 s, which is approximately 99.9997% less than the time cost (45276 s) of the 100-line code. Our code completes one iteration in only 23 s, while the 100-line code needs 103 s. When using our code and the 100-line code, the whole optimization process takes 2097 s and 54551 s, respectively
the computational efficiency of the optimization process can be improved significantly. This work provides an excellent platform into which further extensions... could be easily integrated
